headline: 12 contracts/addresses catalogued across Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, and Polygon; 1 owner multisig and 1 treasury address surfaced for Ethereum; no audit links or formal deployment doc found

findings.text: Ethereum: USDT stablecoin at 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 (name-tagged 'Tether: USDT Stablecoin' on Etherscan); Treasury at 0x5754284f345afc66a98fbb0a0afe71e0f007b949 (name-tagged 'Tether: Treasury'). BSC: 0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955 ('BUSD-T Stablecoin'). Arbitrum: 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9 (USD₮0). Polygon: 0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F (USDT0/Polygon USDT). Optimism bridged token at 0x94b008aA00579c1307B0EF2c499aD98a8ce58e58 (bridged, not directly Tether-issued per Etherscan disclaimer).

Official supported-protocols page at tether.to/en/supported-protocols/ lists Ethereum contract addresses for USDT (0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7), EURt (0xC581b735A1688071A1746c968e0798D642EDE491), CNHt (0x6e109e9dd7fa1a58bc3eff667e8e41fc3cc07aef), XAUt (0x68749665FF8D2d112Fa859AA293F07A622782F38), and MXNt (0xed03ed872159e199065401b6d0d487d78d9464aa). No dedicated 'deployed contracts' page with per-chain admin addresses was found.
No audit links provided in pinned inputs; search did not surface any public audit reports for Tether USDT contracts. One secondary source notes Tether has never published a full audit.

Official GitHub org at https://github.com/tetherto has 130 repositories including Tether-Near (NEAR contract source), WDK wallet modules, and USDT0 bridge code. No Foundry/hardhat deployment artifact files found for EVM USDT in this run; no pinned commit SHA for deployment files.

Multi-chain enumeration: Ethereum USDT confirmed from official source; BSC 0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955 surfaced via BscScan; Arbitrum 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9 and Polygon 0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F surfaced via respective explorers. Avalanche (0x9702230A8Ea53601f5cD2dc00fDBc13d4dF4A8c7) surfaced from a third-party source but not confirmed from official Tether page in this run.
No factory contracts discovered. Tether deploys individual token contracts per chain rather than using a factory pattern.

Owner/admin of Ethereum USDT: 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828 described as a 3-of-6 Gnosis Safe per bhemen/usdt research GitHub. This address controls issuing, redeeming, blacklisting, clawbacks, and pausing. Tether Treasury EOA: 0x5754284f345afc66a98fbb0a0afe71e0f007b949 (Etherscan name tag). Actor class for the multisig is 'multisig'; actor class for treasury is 'unknown' (no on-chain read of bytecode in this run).

All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to at least one fetched URL: USDT Ethereum token to Etherscan and tether.to/en/supported-protocols/; Treasury to Etherscan name tag; Owner multisig to bhemen/usdt GitHub; BSC/Arbitrum/Polygon tokens to respective block explorers. The owner multisig address (0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828) comes from a third-party research repo, not from an official Tether source or DeFiPunkd API call — flagged for re-verification.

rationale.verdict: Discovery walk covered official tether.to/en/supported-protocols/, Etherscan/BscScan/Arbiscan/PolygonScan name-tag search, and github.com/tetherto org. 12 addresses catalogued across 4 EVM chains (Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, Polygon); 5 Ethereum token contracts, 1 treasury, 1 owner multisig (needs on-chain re-verification), and 4 cross-chain token deployments. No audit links or formal deployment-doc page found.

evidence.shows: Official Tether supported-protocols page listing Ethereum contract addresses: USDT 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7, EURt 0xC581b735A1688071A1746c968e0798D642EDE491, CNHt 0x6e109e9dd7fa1a58bc3eff667e8e41fc3cc07aef, XAUt 0x68749665FF8D2d112Fa859AA293F07A622782F38, MXNt 0xed03ed872159e199065401b6d0d487d78d9464aa
Ethereum USDT stablecoin contract at 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7, name-tagged 'Tether: USDT Stablecoin', deployed by Bitfinex Deployer 5
Research repo documenting that USDT owner is 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828, described as a 3-of-6 Gnosis Safe controlling issuing, redeeming, blacklisting, clawbacks, and pausing
BSC USDT token at 0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955, name-tagged 'BUSD-T Stablecoin' on BscScan, BEP-20 standard
Arbitrum USD₮0 token at 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9, name-tagged 'USD₮0' on Arbiscan, associated with usdt0.to (Tether's USDT0 omnichain product)
Polygon USDT/USDT0 token at 0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F on PolygonScan

Optimism USDT token at 0x94b008aA00579c1307B0EF2c499aD98a8ce58e58; Etherscan disclaimer states 'This bridged token is not issued by, redeemable by, or affiliated with, Tether' — bridged, not natively issued
Official Tether GitHub org with 130 repositories including Tether-Near (NEAR contract source) and WDK wallet/bridge SDK modules
Official Tether website homepage confirming Tether originated on Omni Layer (Bitcoin) and ERC-20 (Ethereum), and issues stablecoins pegged to fiat currencies

unknowns: D1: Avalanche USDT address 0x9702230A8Ea53601f5cD2dc00fDBc13d4dF4A8c7 surfaced from third-party source only — needs confirmation from snowtrace.io or official Tether source
D1: Linea, Scroll, Blast, zkSync native USDT addresses not confirmed from official source or explorer in this run
D2: No dedicated canonical 'deployed contracts' page found on tether.to or docs subdomain — deployed_contracts_doc set to supported-protocols page as best available
D3: No public audit reports found for any Tether USDT contract on any chain — D3-offchain: audit search returned zero results
D4: No Foundry/hardhat deployment artifact files found in tetherto GitHub org for EVM USDT in this run; no commit SHA pinned for deployment artifacts

D7: Owner address 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828 sourced from third-party research repo (bhemen/usdt), not confirmed via DeFiPunkd owner() call in this run — needs re-verification via defipunkd.com/api/contract/read?chainId=1&address=0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7&method=owner
D7: Gnosis Safe signer list and current threshold for 0xC6CDE7C39eB2f0F0095F41570af89eFC2C1Ea828 not verified via defipunkd.com/api/safe/owners in this run
D7: BSC USDT (0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955) owner/admin address not determined in this run
D7: Arbitrum USD₮0 (0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9) proxy admin and implementation addresses not read in this run
D7: Polygon USDT0 (0xc2132D05D31c914a87C6611C10748AEb04B58e8F) proxy admin and implementation addresses not read in this run

D8: Ethereum EURt (0xC581b735A1688071A1746c968e0798D642EDE491), CNHt (0x6e109e9dd7fa1a58bc3eff667e8e41fc3cc07aef), XAUt (0x68749665FF8D2d112Fa859AA293F07A622782F38), MXNt (0xed03ed872159e199065401b6d0d487d78d9464aa) — sourced from official tether.to page but no explorer page fetched in this run to confirm on-chain deployment; needs block-explorer verification

admin_addresses.role: owner (3-of-6 multisig controlling mint, burn, pause, blacklist, upgrade)
token (USDT Optimism bridged - not natively Tether-issued)

protocol_metadata.about: Tether is the issuer of USDT, the largest fiat-collateralized stablecoin by market capitalization, pegged 1:1 to the US dollar and backed by reserves of cash, cash equivalents, and short-term US Treasuries. Users deposit fiat with Tether Limited and receive USDT tokens that can be redeemed; when tokens are redeemed, they are burned (called 'redeeming'). The Ethereum ERC-20 contract supports a proprietary upgrade pattern via a 'deprecate' function, and the contract owner (a multisig) holds mint, burn, pause, blacklist, and upgrade powers with no timelock. Tether also issues gold-backed XAUt, euro-pegged EURt, yuan-pegged CNHt, and peso-pegged MXNt tokens, and operates the USDT0 omnichain product using LayerZero OFT standard across 15+ chains.
